# IleStoi.pl

> IleStoi.pl is a public, community-oriented map for documenting vehicles that appear to remain unused or stand in one place for a long time.

Canonical website: https://ilestoi.pl/

## What the service contains

- A map of public, anonymized vehicle and field-photo reports.
- Observation dates, field photos, location context, and verification statuses where available.
- Tools for reviewing location history and preparing a report for the appropriate authority.

Public entries are observations submitted for verification. They are not legal determinations that a vehicle is abandoned, unlawfully parked, uninsured, or owned by any particular person.

## Key pages

- [Interactive map](https://ilestoi.pl/)
- [Privacy and data handling](https://ilestoi.pl/privacy)
- [Correction, anonymization, or removal request](https://ilestoi.pl/report)

## Identity

- Preferred name: IleStoi.pl
- Primary language: Polish
- Canonical host: ilestoi.pl
- Privacy contact: privacy@ilestoi.pl
